scripts.dev: concurrently -n "WEB,API,APP" -c "blue,green,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npx wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
scripts.build: node scripts/prebuild-electron.js && node scripts/prepare-bundled-electron.js && npm run build --prefix frontend && electron-builder -c electron-builder.bundled.json
scripts.build:desktop-bundled: node scripts/prebuild-electron.js && node scripts/prepare-bundled-electron.js && npm run build --prefix frontend && electron-builder -c electron-builder.bundled.json
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
